title: Your first real project with Claude Code: from blank folder to working program

title: How to save Claude Code context tokens and keep sessions sharp

title: Key Claude Code commands every user should know

title: Understanding /insights: read your session stats and work smarter

title: The Bedtime Workflow: End Every Claude Code Session Without Losing Progress
excerpt: A 5-step end-of-session routine for students: commit, save a fresh-start prompt, compact memory, write three bullets, and close cleanly.
